title: potentilla reclinis
intro: Potentilla reclinis, also known as Cinquefoil, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the rose family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anthelmintic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which help to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Potentilla reclinis include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. The plant is traditionally prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in salves and ointments to treat skin conditions.
